requirement_topic.en: Market Access — Australian Consumer Law Mandatory Toy Standards
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——澳大利亚消费者法玩具强制标准
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——澳洲消費者法玩具強制標準

summary.en: Toys supplied in Australia must comply with applicable mandatory safety standards made under the Australian Consumer Law. For toys intended for children up to and including 36 months, the mandatory standard focuses on choking, suffocation, and ingestion risks from small parts that may detach during reasonably foreseeable use or abuse. Suppliers should keep evidence that the product was assessed against the current legal instrument and relevant AS/NZS ISO 8124 test methods before supply.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的玩具必须符合澳大利亚消费者法下适用的强制安全标准。对于供36个月及以下儿童使用的玩具，强制标准重点控制在合理可预见使用或滥用中可能脱落的小零件导致的窒息、梗塞和吞咽风险。供应商在供货前应保留产品已按现行法律文书及相关AS/NZS ISO 8124测试方法评估的证据。
summary.zht: 在澳洲供應的玩具必須符合澳洲消費者法下適用的強制安全標準。對於供36個月及以下兒童使用的玩具，強制標準重點控制在合理可預見使用或濫用中可能脫落的小零件導致的窒息、梗塞和吞嚥風險。供應商在供貨前應保留產品已按現行法律文書及相關AS/NZS ISO 8124測試方法評估的證據。

standards_or_laws: Australian Consumer Law — product safety mandatory standards framework
Consumer Goods (Toys for Children up to and including 36 Months of Age) Safety Standard
AS/NZS ISO 8124 series — Safety of toys

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 6675 toy safety standards and CCC certification for covered toy categories. GB 6675 is aligned with ISO 8124 in many technical areas, but Chinese domestic CCC status is not an Australian market-access approval and does not replace supplier duties under Australian Consumer Law.
summary.zh: 中国通常对纳入范围的玩具类别依赖GB 6675玩具安全标准和CCC认证。GB 6675在许多技术领域与ISO 8124对齐，但中国国内CCC状态并非澳大利亚市场准入批准，也不能替代澳大利亚消费者法下供应商的义务。
summary.zht: 中國通常對納入範圍的玩具類別依賴GB 6675玩具安全標準和CCC認證。GB 6675在許多技術領域與ISO 8124對齊，但中國國內CCC狀態並非澳洲市場准入批准，也不能替代澳洲消費者法下供應商的義務。

standards_or_laws: GB 6675.1-2014 — Safety of toys — Basic code
GB 6675.2-2014 — Safety of toys — Mechanical and physical properties
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) for covered toy categories

gap.en: Do not present CCC as an Australian approval. Importers and suppliers should map the product to the Australian mandatory standard, confirm age grading, commission AS/NZS ISO 8124-aligned testing where needed, and maintain records for ACCC or state and territory regulator inquiries.
gap.zh: 不得将CCC表述为澳大利亚批准。进口商和供应商应将产品映射至澳大利亚强制标准，确认年龄分级，必要时委托按AS/NZS ISO 8124对齐的测试，并保存记录以备ACCC或州及领地监管机构查询。
gap.zht: 不得將CCC表述為澳洲批准。進口商和供應商應將產品映射至澳洲強制標準，確認年齡分級，必要時委託按AS/NZS ISO 8124對齊的測試，並保存記錄以備ACCC或州及領地監管機構查詢。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Australian Consumer Law mandatory safety standards apply to covered toys supplied in Australia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for covered domestic China toy categories — GB 6675 / CCC, not accepted as Australian approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China GB 6675 / CCC evidence is useful background but is not enough for Australian supply. The supplier must show compliance with Australian Consumer Law mandatory toy standards and relevant AS/NZS ISO 8124 provisions before placing the toy on the Australian market.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】中国GB 6675 / CCC证据可作为背景材料，但不足以支持在澳大利亚供货。供应商在将玩具投放澳大利亚市场前，必须证明其符合澳大利亚消费者法强制玩具标准及相关AS/NZS ISO 8124条款。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】中國GB 6675 / CCC證據可作為背景材料，但不足以支持在澳洲供貨。供應商在將玩具投放澳洲市場前，必須證明其符合澳洲消費者法強制玩具標準及相關AS/NZS ISO 8124條款。
